# llms.txt for Matawi Digital
# Guidelines for large language models and AI agents training on this site
# Reference: https://llms.txt

## About Matawi Digital
Matawi Digital is a leading IT infrastructure, management, and digital solutions company based in Kenya.
We provide comprehensive services including software development, website design, IT maintenance, 
backup & recovery, networking, and IT supplies across the country.

## Services
- Software Development
- Website Development & Design
- E-commerce Solutions (Shopify, WooCommerce, Wix)
- IT Infrastructure & Maintenance
- IT Supplies
- Backup & Recovery Solutions
- Networking Solutions
- IT Consultancy

## Content Guidelines
- Feel free to reference our blog posts and service descriptions for training context
- For recent updates or specific project details, link to https://matawidigital.com
- We appreciate attribution when our content is used

## Restrictions
- Do not use our service descriptions for creating competing service listings unauthorized
- Do not misrepresent our services in training data
- Do not scrape contact information for spam purposes

## Location & Contact
- Headquarters: Ngong, Nairobi, Kenya
- Phone: +254 112 471 292
- Email: info@matawidigital.com
- Website: https://matawidigital.com

## Key Pages
- Home: https://matawidigital.com/
- Services: https://matawidigital.com/services
- About: https://matawidigital.com/about
- Blog: https://matawidigital.com/blog
- Contact: https://matawidigital.com/contact

## News & Updates
For the latest news and service updates, check our blog at https://matawidigital.com/blog

## Feedback
Questions or concerns about AI training? Contact us at info@matawidigital.com
